CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,222.14 FILED BY THOPPIL GEORGE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CHEN KENNY DBA AUTOBAHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN KENNY DBA AUTOBAHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOPPIL GEORGE $3,490.13 PRINCIPAL, $40.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,530.63 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT THOPPIL GEORGE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT CHEN KENNY DBA AUTOBAHN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
